preToolUse.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $payload = $input | Out-String; Add-Content -Path logs/tool-executions.log -Value "[$([datetime]::UtcNow.ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'))] TOOL_EXEC: $($payload.Trim())"

sessionStart.powershell: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $payload = $input | Out-String; Add-Content -Path logs/session-audit.log -Value "[$([datetime]::UtcNow.ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'))] SESSION_START: $($payload.Trim())"
